tweets.text:
US total liquids ex-SPR/propane/propylene saw a draw of ~7 million bbls this week.

We have to exclude propane/propylene when looking at the oil balance as NGLs typically build during this time of the year.

This is what the oil balance really looks like and below is our projection for the end of July.

Yes, we are going into uncharted territories.
